news.title: Alphabet paces for worst day in a year on AI concerns after high-profile exits
news.summary: Google parent Alphabet has seen consecutive high-profile artificial intelligence researchers leave the company. Google has also seen a number of its top engineers leave in recent months.

news.title: SpaceX signs computing power deal with open-source AI startup Reflection worth up to $6.3 billion
news.summary: SpaceX has turned its Colossus data center into a commercial computing power platform. The company has landed recent deals with Anthropic, Google and Cursor.

news.title: Alan Greenspan, former chairman of the Fed, dies at age 100
news.summary: Alan Greenspan presided over the Federal Reserve for 19 years under four presidents. Greenspan mastered the art of obfuscation known as Fedspeak.

news.title: SpaceX stock falls 9%, pacing for third-straight day of losses after red-hot IPO start
news.summary: A rally following the company's record breaking IPO on June 12 has cooled, with stock dropping the past two full days of trading. The company's stock has dropped more than 20% since the IPO.

news.title: Treasury Department authorizes Iranian oil sales through August
news.summary: Iranian supertankers have switched on their transponders, after going dark during the war. Supertankers depart the Persian Gulf loaded with oil.

news.title: The loneliness crisis has gotten so bad that lawmakers are ready to spend millions of dollars to fight it
news.summary: The health damage of loneliness is similar to heavy smoking and obesity, experts say. Loneliness is linked to increased risk of depression, anxiety and cardiovascular disease, they say.

news.title: China’s weird new economic spark: toy elves and robocops
news.summary: Young Chinese aren’t buying status symbols. They’re spending money on things that make them feel something — anything. It’s not about status symbols, but about making people feel something.

news.title: Alphabet sees $269 billion market-cap wipeout as investors fear it’s losing the war for AI talent
news.summary: Two AI leaders, including a Nobel laureate, recently said they would leave Google for rival labs. Two AI leaders have said they will leave Google to join rival labs for AI.

news.title: Caterpillar’s stock hits a milestone as roaring industrials rally sweeps up Wall Street
news.summary: Caterpillar is the hottest stock in the Dow this year. It is one of just two in the index with a price above $1,000.

news.title: Super Micro’s stock is seeing its best run in a year thanks to Nvidia partnership
news.summary: Super Micro shares were leading the S&P 500’s gainers on Monday. Super Micro shares are up more than 10% this year.
